title: S-Chain: Structured Visual Chain-of-Thought For Medicine
key_findings: SV-CoT supervision improves interpretability, grounding fidelity, and robustness
Auto-generated CoTs often lack structure and explicit correspondence to image regions
contributions: Proposal of a new mechanism for visual evidence and reasoning alignment

auto_generation_approaches.name: MC-CoT
auto_generation_approaches.description: Leverages modular pipelines where LLMs generate reasoning steps in zero-shot settings

auto_generation_approaches.name: MedCoT
auto_generation_approaches.description: Introduces hierarchical expert verification to refine auto-generated rationales

auto_generation_approaches.name: PMC-VQA
auto_generation_approaches.description: Relies on template-based or synthetic QA generation
